category_sources: source_facts.description says Java SQL database; official H2 website and GitHub README describe H2 as a Java SQL database and embeddable RDBMS.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses H2 Database Engine; official GitHub README says Welcome to H2, the Java SQL database.
docs_sources: Official H2 documentation site provides main documentation, tutorial, and SQL command reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/h2database/h2database; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Java SQL database; official GitHub README lists JDBC API, embedded/server modes, and SQL documentation.
